description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow has multiple jobs: tests, check_secrets, installer, installer_test, and docker_push_image. The tests job runs on ubuntu-latest and macos-latest, checks out the repository, installs Nix, and runs flake check. The check_secrets job checks for Cachix and Docker secrets. The installer job builds an installer if secrets are present. The installer_test job tests the installer on multiple OS. The docker_push_image job builds and pushes a Docker image if secrets and conditions are met.
